verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In great respect and honour For this noble life you've lived We know that this is not the end, We'll see you soon someday Now you're no longer trapped in time But you're blended with eternity We say to you until dear soldier, Go and rest in your Theophany

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We salute, a soldier of the cross A mighty gentile warrior A brother, a father and a friend We salute, a victorious overcomer A battle-scarred warrior Our brother, we salute you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through the testing and the trials Your faith only grew stronger Always standing at your post of duty Shouting from the'Amen corner' Now your chapters have been written And the book of your life is closed You'll hear Him say, Well done my child You have overcome as I

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We salute a soldier of the cross A mighty gentile warrior A sister, a mother and a friend We salute, a victorious overcomer A battle-scarred warrior Our sister, we salute you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Remembering your years of sacrifice And service to the Bride We saw it was the life of Christ Displayed before our eyes Your dedication and commitment To the cause for which you stood Gives us faith to press on to the end Knowing we'll meet you soon again

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We salute, a soldier of the cross A mighty gentile warrior A brother, a father and a friend We salute, a victorious overcomer A battle-scarred warrior Our brother, we salute you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You were a servant to the cause The work and ministry of the Lord The beauty of Israel on display A live voice thundering forth Today we bless our God on high For your fervent princely life God's promise wil be our anchor in faith Our brother we'll meet in the skies

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We salute a soldier of the cross A mighty gentile warrior A sister, a mother and a friend We salute, a victorious overcomer A battle-scarred warrior Our sister, we salute you
